title: A Stick Of Incense
content:
Whence did all that fury come?
From empty tomb or Virgin womb?
Saint Joseph thought the world would melt
But liked the way his finger smelt.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Stick Of Incense"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
